hooks.command: $git = 'C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\app-3.6.1\resources\app\git\cmd\git.exe'; Set-Location 'c:\Users\User\Documents\GitHub\hostlyb-com'; & $git add -A; & $git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { & $git commit -m 'auto: sync'; & $git pull --rebase origin main; & $git push origin main } 2>$null
